stem: In the xy-plane, the graph of a function crosses the x-axis at the point (x, 0) and passes through (9, 0). What is the value of x?
rationale: The x-intercept of a graph is the point where the graph crosses the x-axis (where y = 0). Since the graph passes through (9, 0), the value of x at the x-intercept is 9.
